landingPage.hero.tagline: We don't just prompt; we architect. {brand} bridges the gap between AI hype and {highlight}.
landingPage.services.heading: AI Services,
landingPage.services.description: End-to-end AI engineering from architecture to deployment.
landingPage.services.llm_description: Domain-specific model adaptation with LoRA, QLoRA, and RLHF pipelines. We transform general-purpose models into precision instruments for your industry.
landingPage.services.agentic_description: Multi-agent orchestration systems that reason, plan, and execute autonomously across complex business processes.
landingPage.services.rag_description: Enterprise-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems combining semantic search with hybrid retrieval for hallucination-free intelligence.
landingPage.services.strategy_description: From proof-of-concept to production. We audit your AI stack and deliver a roadmap for scalable intelligence.
landingPage.services.safety_description: Production guardrails, red-teaming, and compliance frameworks ensuring your models behave reliably at scale.
landingPage.expertise.heading: Built by
landingPage.expertise.description: Deep research backgrounds, production scars, and an obsession with getting it right.
landingPage.expertise.why_senior: Senior engineers only — no juniors on your project
landingPage.contact.heading: Ready to Ship
landingPage.contact.description: Tell us about your challenge. We'll respond within 24 hours with a technical assessment — no generic sales pitch, just direct engineering insight.
landingPage.contact.quote_text: solve.this cut our RAG hallucination rate from 23% to 1.8% in six weeks. They understood our domain immediately.
landingPage.contact.quote_author: — Head of AI, Fortune 500 Financial Services
landingPage.contact.form_message_placeholder: Describe your AI challenge, current stack, and timeline...
landingPage.contact.form_privacy: By submitting you agree to our privacy policy. No spam, ever.
landingPage.contact.success_desc: We'll review your project and get back to you within 24 hours.
landingPage.meta.title: solve.this — Elite AI Engineering
landingPage.meta.description: solve.this — Elite AI Engineering Collective. We architect production-grade LLM fine-tuning, agentic workflows, and RAG systems.
landingPage.toast.detail: We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
landingPage.contact.toast_sheet_success: Logged to the Google Sheet successfully.
landingPage.contact.toast_sheet_failed: We saved your request locally but could not reach the spreadsheet.
landingPage.contact.toast_sheet_skipped: Submission captured. Configure sheet sync to forward automatically.
landingPage.contact.sheet_status_failed: Could not reach spreadsheet. Saved locally.
